title: Track benchmark-versus-random generalization gap and stability
description:
## Summary
As a score operator, I want to see the gap between fixed benchmark performance and random-sample performance, so that I can judge whether a score is generalizing beyond curated cases.

Feature: Generalization-gap monitoring
Scenario: Operator compares benchmark and random performance
Given a score with a fixed benchmark dataset and one or more random evaluation runs
When Plexus computes workflow comparison metrics
Then it should expose the benchmark-versus-random generalization gap
And it should show enough context to tell whether the observed gap is stable or noisy

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Story now satisfied by completed generalization metrics implementation in plx-cface0 and bundle/compact summary surfaces. Closing story as complete.
